metadata.description: Add a new custom meal type called 'Morning Snack' to your Eat This Much meal layout. Set the meal size to 'Tiny' and the cooking preference to 'No Cooking', then save it.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: Add a new custom meal type called 'Morning Snack' to your Eat This Much meal layout. Set the meal size to 'Tiny' and the cooking preference to 'No Cooking', then save it.
